problem id: ca14582d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(1)

examples:
  01100011 -> 11110000
  01011011 -> 00000011
  01111100 -> 00111111
  10011110 -> 11010101
  01001101 -> 01001110
  11011101 -> 01100111
  11110000 -> 11101111
  11110111 -> 10010001
  00000110 -> 01101100

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 10101111
